title: cola mayumbensis
intro: Cola mayumbensis is a species of plant in the family Sterculiaceae, commonly known as the Congolese cola nut tree or Mayumbe cola nut. It is native to central Africa, particularly in the Congo Basin. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cola mayumbensis include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusing the leaves in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
